subcodes.first_line: O Thou by Whose command the tongues of all created things give utterance to verses of praise and attributes in glorification of His Being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من نطق السن الکائنات بایات المحامد و النعوت فی تسبیح ذاته
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for protection
